g.text: RENDERER: UNTRUSTED, sandboxed, per origin, 100% Zig, no PROT_EXEC

text.tspan: TRUST BOUNDARY: the host treats every renderer byte as hostile:
validating parser (bounds + masked indices), robust to a mutating producer

g.text: SHARED MEMORY: host-created, fd passed once (SCM_RIGHTS), memfd+F_SEAL_SHRINK on Linux
Luau VM: interpreter-only (compiled from source, no bytecode load)
encode: damage at age 1, else full
take newest: check, then exchange, then validate
drain to head (clamp to capacity; tail = ack)
